name: Post-polish Stabilization and Candidate Closure Gate
decision: Close Phase 20 as closed_stabilized after DB-only read-surface polish. Do not promote Go text attachment body search or any write/file/migration ownership as the next active scope.

stabilization_review.read_surface_result: The hardened Go read-only surface remains limited to GET /api/test, /api/categories, /api/tags, /api/notes, and numeric note detail.
stabilization_review.parity_result: 20.3 closed the DB-only attachment metadata search parity gap with a Python vs Go response diff fixture.
stabilization_review.remaining_gap: Text attachment body search still belongs to Python because it requires request-time file body scanning outside the current DB-only Go read contract.
stabilization_review.risk_decision: Do not open file-read parity as the automatic next step. It would require a separate data-dir/path traversal/file type/performance/rollback contract before any implementation.
stabilization_review.phase20_conclusion: No further Go ownership expansion is justified by Phase 20 evidence.

python: All POST / PUT / DELETE / PATCH routes
Files, uploads, attachments endpoints, cleanup, import/export, frontend/static assets, migrations, and runtime operations

not_selected_next.reason: Requires Go file body scanning beyond SQLite query_only DB reads; needs a separate file-read safety contract before any implementation.
20.1 inventory already identified transaction, file side-effect, backup, rollback, CSRF/local-only, and fixture blockers.
20.4 is plan-only stabilization and does not authorize live Pi, Caddy, systemd, frontend, or exposure changes.

verification_evidence_required: tests/test_phase20_go_read_surface_polish.py continues to lock 20.3 DB-only read polish
tests/test_phase18_go_shadow_contract.py continues to run Python vs Go response diff for the hardened read surface
not_authorized_by_20_4: Caddy route expansion beyond the validated GET read surface
Changing prism-go-readonly.service away from SQLite query_only
Live Pi service or Caddy reload

result.conclusion: Phase 20 ends with the existing Go read-only surface tightened but not expanded. Future file-read parity, delivery, deploy, push, or product queue work requires a separate approved gate.

allowed_next_step.title: Delivery and Queue Selection Gate
allowed_next_step.scope: Plan-only selection of the next branch after Phase 20 closure: local-only commit/push, Pi delivery planning, file-read parity assessment, or return to product/frontend backlog. This does not authorize deployment, Caddy/service changes, Go file-read implementation, Go writes/files/migrations, frontend default changes, Python removal, or public exposure.
not_authorized_without_approval: Pi deploy or live service reload
Changing prism-go-readonly.service away from SQLite query_only
